# Jazz Jam Studio

> Practice sessions that matter

Jazz Jam Studio is a mobile app for jazz musicians to practice improvisation with a virtual band. Available on Android.

## Features

- Virtual Band Practice: Play along with a realistic rhythm section (piano, bass, drums) that follows standard jazz conventions.
- Chord Progression Library: Access a curated collection of jazz standards and common chord progressions to practice with.
- Flexible Practice Tools: Adjust tempo, choose different keys, and customize your practice sessions to focus on what matters most.

## Links

- Website: https://jazzjam.app
- Privacy Policy: https://jazzjam.app/privacy-policy/
- License: https://jazzjam.app/license/
